neighborhoods.name: Casco Viejo (San Felipe)
neighborhoods.description: UNESCO colonial quarter on a peninsula with restored colonial buildings, rooftop bars, and canal views

housing.predominantType: Restored colonial apartments and boutique residences

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Panama City. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Panama City

neighborhoods.name: El Chorrillo
neighborhoods.description: Adjacent working-class neighborhood with lower costs and proximity to Casco attractions
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Panama City's center and services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Panama City

neighborhoods.name: Santa Ana
neighborhoods.description: Historic commercial district between Casco and downtown with markets and affordable options
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Panama City

neighborhoods.name: Restored Casco Viejo
neighborhoods.description: The fully restored blocks of Casco with art galleries, wine bars, and international residents

housing.predominantType: Luxury restored colonial apartments and penthouses

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Panama City
